action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 22 failed because importing mmseg decode heads triggers an mmengine Adafactor registration conflict, so model.py crashes on load. Best official mIoU is 0.5132. With ~67 minutes left, I cannot retrain; I must reconstruct the exact model architecture in pure PyTorch to match the checkpoint's state_dict keys without importing mmseg. Analysis: Before rewriting model.py, I must inspect the checkpoint key names to replicate the exact module hierarchy (e.g., ConvModule's .conv/.bn naming, PPM's sequential indices, etc.). I will run a quick inspection script on checkpoints/best.pt and best_iter15.pt, then write a pure-PyTorch UPerHead+FCNHead that loads the existing weights cleanly. Decision: Inspect checkpoint keys first, then write a compatible model.py and predict.py, run a 10-second load+forward check, and immediately submit eval.
